voice_observations.caption_text:
Ounass Presents: Nathalie Fanj, founder of Studio Fanj, introduces her collection, shaped by organic forms and fluid designs. From statement pieces to everyday accents, discover how each creation can be styled across your space. Shop the brand on Ounass.

أُناس تقدّم: نتالي فنج، مؤسسة استوديو فنج، حيث تقدّم تشكيلتها المصقولة من الأشكال العضوية والتصاميم الانسيابية. من القطع البارزة إلى إكسسوارات المنزل اليومية، اكتشفي الإبداعات التي تضيف لمسة فن إلى مساحات منزلك. تسوّقي الماركة على أُناس.
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hi, this is Nathalie Fenge, founder of Studio Fenge. Studio Fenge is a home decor brand that was born out of my passion for sculptural and organic design. Let's take a closer look at the pieces. Starting with our hero piece, the Sahara, which is inspired by the desert dunes. Moving on to our Onda, which is inspired by the beach waves. It can be used for jewelry, for food. And here we have a bigger version of the Onda, which is the cheese board. And from the same family, we have these gorgeous coffee cups that come with coasters. And they come in a set of two. You have a range of candles, and they come in different sizes, different scents. So here we have the Leva, and this is the Styria. It's a smaller version. And you have the Leterra candle. It smells so good. We use soil wax, which is eco-friendly. Moving on to our Leterra vase, which is a unique creation. It's actually a rolled paper. Lastly, our big vases. You have the Telia vase, which is a double vase. It's a beautiful centerpiece. And we have our Nebula burgundy vase. Very organic shape. You can fill it with flowers or use it as a standalone piece. I'm so excited to introduce Studio French on Unas, and I can't wait for you guys to explore the whole collection.
notable_phrases: Ounass Presents: Nathalie Fanj, founder of Studio Fanj, introduces her collection, shaped by organic forms and fluid designs. From statement pieces to everyday accents, discover how each creation can be styled across your space. Shop the brand on Ounass

أُناس تقدّم: نتالي فنج، مؤسسة استوديو فنج، حيث تقدّم تشكيلتها المصقولة من الأشكال العضوية والتصاميم الانسيابية. من القطع البارزة إلى إكسسوارات المنزل اليومية، اكتشفي الإبداعات التي تضيف لمسة فن إلى مساحات منزلك. تسوّقي الماركة على أُناس
